---
title: superfluous-else
description: "Remove else after terminating branches."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Remove else after terminating branches. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if err != nil { return err } else { use(value) }
```

## Good

```go
if err != nil { return err }
use(value)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only superfluous-else`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
